name: Jamaican Hot Wings
recipeIngredient: 5 pounds Chicken Wings (Drumettes, Fresh Not Frozen)
recipeInstructions: Jamaican jerk spice may be found in specialty food stores. Melt the butter in a 2-quart sauce pot over low heat. Add the jerk spice, Tabasco sauce, and tomato juice. Mix well and set aside. Rinse the wings under cold running water and pat dry with paper towels. Dust each wing with flour and deep fry in a heavy pot or skillet in about 2 inches of hot oil until cooked through. Place the cooked wings in the sauce mixture and allow to marinate for a few minutes. Drain any excess oil. Serve immediately. Makes 40 to 50 Wings
